mapper.insert: INSERT INTO weight_record (user_id, weight, record_date, remark, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{weight}, #{recordDate}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM weight_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY record_date DESC
SELECT * FROM weight_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND record_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ORDER BY record_date ASC
SELECT * FROM weight_record WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM weight_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date = #{recordDate} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE weight_record SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE weight_record SET weight = #{weight}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
